org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.parser

implements GMLConstants, GMLParserConstants

    • Method Detail

      • execute

        public Element execute(Document xmlDocument)
                throws GMLException
        Run the lexer and the syntax analyzer.
        Parameters:
        xmlDocument - is the document that permits to create the DOM.
        Returns:
        the root of the DOM (just inside the given document).
        Throws:
        GMLException
